abort.already_configured_as_subentry: This Steam account is already configured as a sub-entry.

reauth_confirm.description:
The Steam integration requires re-authentication.

You can find your Steam Web API key [**here**]({api_key_url}).
reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]

reconfigure.description: You can find your Steam Web API key [**here**]({api_key_url}).
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure {name}

user.description: Before continuing, obtain a Steam Web API key and your Steam ID. Create an API key [**here**]({api_key_url}). To locate your Steam ID (SteamID64), sign in to Steam and open [**Account Details**]({account_id_url}).

abort.already_configured: Already configured as a friend in this or another account.
abort.already_configured_as_entry: This account is already configured as a service and cannot be added as a friend.
abort.config_entry_not_loaded: Cannot add friend accounts when the main account is disabled or not loaded.
abort.friendlist_private:
Your friend list appears to be private or inaccessible.

To add friend accounts open Steam and go to [**{name} > Profile > Edit Profile > Privacy Settings**]({privacy_settings_url}) and set **Friends List** to **Public**.

Once your friends are added, you can switch it back to your preferred privacy setting.
abort.no_more_friends: All friends from your friend list have already been added.

data_description.account: Select a friend from your friend list to track their online status.

user.description: Track the online status of a Steam friend.
user.title: Friend online status

auth_exception.message: Failed to connect to Steam due to an authentication error

request_exception.message: Failed to connect to Steam due to a request error

timeout_exception.message: Failed to connect to Steam due to a request timeout
